_comment_plugin_setup: First-time setup: run `/plugin marketplace add github:ajenchen/design-system` in Claude Code → then `/plugin install design-system@qijenchen-ds`. Plugin auto-enables thereafter (Phase 7 marketplace flow,per design-system .claude-plugin/marketplace.json). Bootstrap hooks 在 plugin 裝好前先補 first-time mechanical gate(committed in fork,不依賴 plugin)。
